title: Problem Solved
content:
The language error during the past few days has something to do with my importing of the database backup. I have to go back several days to in order to retrieve a clean copy of the blog data.

Problem's gone now. Lucky me.

Good thing I'm a backup freak. --"

(The problem has something to do with importing UTF-8 data over non-UTF-8 database connection, I believe. By the way, it's all began when I want to try out the beta of MT4. It was really an unwise decision to try a beta software on actual data. Hehehehe)

WordPress has nothing to do with any of this. I just feel .. adventurous. :P

(Actually, I'm planning to use WordPress for to run the company's website. So I decide to get to know it in detail first.)
